_doc: PointCast contract addresses. After originating via /admin/deploy (or scripts/deploy-visit-nouns-shadownet.mjs for Shadownet), paste the KT1 address here and redeploy. Frontend mint buttons read this file at build time — empty string = button stays 'soon', populated = live mint flow. Ghostnet is deprecated as of 2026-04; Shadownet is the active testnet.

_shadownet_notes.note: Originated via scripts/deploy-visit-nouns-shadownet.mjs (direct Taquito + InMemorySigner). Signer keypair is test-only — DO NOT reuse for Mainnet.

_mainnet_notes.note: Originated via scripts/deploy-visit-nouns-mainnet.mjs. Admin is the throwaway signer — transfer to Mike's mainnet wallet via set_administrator as a second step.

_notes.status: Frontend, JSON manifest, and TZIP-21 metadata endpoints are ready. A dedicated FA2 contract still needs origination before /zen-cats can mint on mainnet.
_notes.doNotReuse: Visit Nouns is live on mainnet, but its entrypoint and metadata are Noun-specific. Zen Cats should get its own PCCAT contract.

marketplace._version_doc: Marketplace contract version. v3 (current): list_ask takes (fa2_contract, token_id, amount_mutez, royalty_bps); royalty_receiver is contract-wide. v4 (planned): list_ask adds royalty_receiver per-ask so sellers pick at list time. /market reads this field — when version >= 4, the royalty-receiver UI surfaces and the list_ask batch call includes the param.

_mainnet_notes._legacy_marketplace_note: When v4 originates, paste v3 KT1 into _legacy_marketplace so /market keeps showing v3's open asks in a read-only 'legacy' lane. /market loadAsks() reads both mainnet + every address in _legacy_marketplace.
_mainnet_notes.note: Third-time-charm origination on 2026-04-26 PM. v1 (KT1SLFv2u…) and v2 (KT1ABfp7c…) both shipped with the FA2 transfer dispatch laid out alphabetically — (amount, to_, token_id) — instead of canonical TZIP-12 (to_, token_id, amount). Coffee Mugs FA2 uses canonical, so sp.contract returned None at fulfill_ask and every buy attempt died with INVALID_FA2_CONTRACT. v3 was originated through the new pre-sign FA2-layout safety check on /admin/deploy/new (PR #135 / commit f71225b) which walks the parsed Michelson, refuses to enable Sign if the inner record is alphabetical, and showed a green ✓ canonical banner this time. On-chain bytecode verified post-origination: inner record field order = (to_, token_id, amount) ✓ canonical. Storage initialised: platform_fee_bps=250 (2.5%), both receivers = mainwallet, paused=false, next_ask_id=0, asks=empty bigmap (806745).

_orphans.reason: FA2 transfer dispatch field order on-chain was alphabetical (amount, (to_, token_id)) instead of the canonical (to_, (token_id, amount)) that the SmartPy source declared via .layout(...) and the staged artifact contained. Most likely cause: a stale Cloudflare-cached pre-#124 artifact reached /admin/deploy/new at sign time, or a manually pasted older version slipped through. Either way fulfill_ask reverted with INVALID_FA2_CONTRACT against any canonical FA2 (Coffee Mugs, Visit Nouns, all of objkt's catalogue). Replaced by v3 KT1DoUowvD6… 2026-04-26 PM with the pre-sign safety check now blocking this exact regression. Do not list, do not redeploy frontend against.

First marketplace origination — same INVALID_FA2_CONTRACT class as v2, same alphabetical-default field order in the FA2 transfer dispatch. Two orphan asks landed before discovery (ask 0: Mike's Ceramic Mug at 0.5ꜩ; ask 1: external seller's Espresso Cup at 0.5ꜩ). Both unfulfillable. Mike can cancel ask 0 from his wallet; ask 1 is stuck until its seller cancels. Do not list, do not redeploy frontend against.

_notes.purpose: PointCast-native multi-collection FA2 marketplace. Per-ask fa2_contract means one originated KT1 handles every PointCast collection (Coffee Mugs, Visit Nouns, future Birthdays + Drum + Window Snapshots). Sellers approve marketplace as FA2 operator, then list_ask. Buyers fulfill_ask with amount = listing price; contract dispatches FA2 transfer + splits payment into seller / 2.5% platform fee / per-listing royalty.
_notes.shape: asks bigmap: { ask_id: nat → { seller, fa2_contract, token_id, amount_mutez, royalty_bps } }
_notes.safety: Pre-sign layout check on /admin/deploy/new walks the parsed Michelson for any list(pair(%from_, list(pair(...inner...)) %txs)) shape and refuses to enable Sign if the inner record is alphabetical (amount, to_, token_id) instead of canonical (to_, token_id, amount). Catches both the FA2 contract's own %transfer parameter type AND any CONTRACT %transfer dispatch in a marketplace. Verified live 2026-04-26 PM.

_notes.purpose: Public race-receipt ledger for deterministic Agent Derby results. Empty KT1 values keep the frontend in signed/local receipt mode until origination.

_mainnet_notes.note: Originated via /admin/deploy/new (Publisher) with the auto-admin-patch — admin landed on Mike's mainwallet directly, no throwaway hop. Supersedes the earlier orphan KT1U6TrcNVwCmfkCZJysxFDyaYrYpV8shZCL (admin was the SmartPy test address). register_tokens(...) applied 2026-04-25T20:47:52Z; set_metadata_base_uri applied 2026-04-25T20:48:46Z — contract is fully usable.

_orphan_notes.reason: admin = SmartPy test address (tz1UyQDe…) baked into storage by the test scenario; pre-flight admin auto-patch did not yet exist. Do not list, do not redeploy frontend against.

_notes.purpose: Five rarity-tiered mug NFTs claimable from /coffee. Public free mint (gas-only), edition caps enforced on-chain, cup-count eligibility gated client-side. Token names registered via register_tokens() admin op post-origination.

Free open-edition FA2 — three painted interiors as token_ids 0..2, edition cap 100 each. First drop in the Window Snapshots collection foreshadowed in the 2026-04-26 marketplace press release. Public mint, gas-only, mirrors Coffee Mugs deploy path. Empty KT1 keeps the /market 'list your token' option in the dropdown filtered to live collections only.
_notes.deployPath: /admin/deploy/new (Publisher with auto-admin-patch — same path Coffee Mugs took)

birthdays.tokenIdConvention: PointCast block ID as integer (block 0366 → token_id 366)

_notes.purpose: Free open-edition FA2 — one token_id per BIRTHDAY block on PointCast, claimable from /b/{id} + /cake. Public mint, gas-only, one claim per wallet per token_id. Empty KT1 keeps the BirthdayMint button in 'pending contract' mode.

20 horse tokens for the 152nd Kentucky Derby (May 3, 2026). Free open-edition mint per horse — gas-only, one claim per wallet per horse. Empty KT1 keeps the /roses 'mint your pick' button in 'pending contract' mode. Token IDs map to post positions: token 1 = RENEGADE (post 1), token 17 = SIX SPEED (post 17), etc.
_notes.registerScript: scripts/register-derby-picks.mjs (TODO — one-shot reads src/data/derby-152.ts and calls register_pick × 20)
